title: Cybersecurity Job-Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Protect Systems, Detect Threats & Handle Security Incidents
description: Master networking, system security, vulnerability assessment, SIEM & incident response. Become a job-ready Security Analyst in 12 weeks.

projects.title: Network Analysis Lab
projects.description: Monitor network packet flows and isolate malicious actions.

projects.title: Vulnerability Assessment
projects.description: Scan system setups and generate security fixes reports.

projects.title: Security Audit Project
projects.description: Create a full threat modeling audit for enterprise networks.

projects.title: SIEM Incident Response
projects.description: Configure SIEM dashboards and triage simulated network attacks.

requirements: Basic understanding of computers and operating systems
No prior cybersecurity or programming experience required

curriculum.title: Networking & OS Security Foundations

lessons.title: TCP/IP models, routing protocols & network protocols
Linux systems administration, access controls & permissions

curriculum.practice: Perform port scans and traffic sniffing using Nmap & Wireshark
curriculum.outcome: Can analyze network architecture and manage fundamental OS security.

curriculum.title: Vulnerability Scan & SIEM Tracking

lessons.title: Introduction to SIEM platforms (Splunk/ELK stack) & log parsing

curriculum.practice: Scan a mock server using vulnerability scanner & analyze reports
curriculum.outcome: Identify network flaws and navigate SIEM systems for event log tracking.

curriculum.title: Incident Handling & Cloud Security

lessons.title: Threat hunting, triage, incident containment & report structures
Cloud security concepts: IAM, AWS structures & guardrails
Completing security assessment audit & defense mock scenarios

curriculum.practice: Draft incident response report for a simulated ransomware attack
curriculum.outcome: Job-ready Cybersecurity Analyst, SOC Analyst or Security Associate.

features: Hands-on training in virtual lab environment
Learn actual attack, threat analysis, and defense concepts
Prepares you for Cybersecurity Analyst, SOC Analyst, and Security Associate roles
